positive: A whimsical, stylized forest landscape featuring diverse woodland creatures—a fox reading a book, a owl perched on a branch, and a friendly deer grazing—interacting with magical, glowing flora. The composition should be a circular, crest-like arrangement, with central elements forming a clear focal point. Style: Modern flat illustration mixed with whimsical storybook art. Color Palette: Deep forest greens, muted earth tones (sienna, taupe), highlighted by glowing bioluminescent cyan and pale gold accents. Lighting: Soft, diffused backlight emphasizing the magic. Composition: High contrast silhouette elements integrated with richly detailed, pattern-filled flora. Ideal for t-shirt print, clean lines, symmetrical balance, vector-art feel.
negative: blurry, low resolution, text, signature, watermark, logo, extra limbs, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, noise, grain, photorealism, deep shadows, messy, dirty
